creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: eadler
Date: Mon May 26 20:27:59 2014
New Revision: 355446
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355446
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355446/

Log:
  - Update flash to the latest version
  - Add desktop-file-utils
  
  PR:		ports/189856
  PR:		ports/190150

Modified:
  head/www/linux-f10-flashplugin11/Makefile
  head/www/linux-f10-flashplugin11/distinfo

Modified: head/www/linux-f10-flashplugin11/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/linux-f10-flashplugin11/Makefile	Mon May 26 20:23:16 2014	(r355445)
+++ head/www/linux-f10-flashplugin11/Makefile	Mon May 26 20:27:59 2014	(r355446)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	flashplugin
-PORTVERSION=	11.2r202.356
+PORTVERSION=	11.2r202.359
 CATEGORIES=	www multimedia linux
 MASTER_SITES=	http://fpdownload.macromedia.com/get/flashplayer/pdc/${PORTVERSION:C/r/\./}/:plugin \
 		LOCAL/nox:suplib
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ RESTRICTED_FILES=	${DISTFILES:Nlinux-f10
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 NO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
 
-USES=		webplugin:linux
+USES=		webplugin:linux	desktop-file-utils
 WEBPLUGIN_FILES=	libflashplayer.so
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	GNOME

Modified: head/www/linux-f10-flashplugin11/distinfo
==============================================================================

-SIZE (flashplugin/11.2r202.356/linux-f10-flashsupport-9.0.1.i386.tar.gz) = 3455

+SHA256 (flashplugin/11.2r202.359/linux-f10-flashsupport-9.0.1.i386.tar.gz) = 4a309b1a326bd2212cc72480628659e5a7fd61d9e0572cb7350c206f030955bf
+SIZE (flashplugin/11.2r202.359/linux-f10-flashsupport-9.0.1.i386.tar.gz) = 3455
